allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('SCRIPTS:', list\(p.get\('scripts',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('DEPS:', list\(p.get\('dependencies',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('DEVDEPS:', list\(p.get\('devDependencies',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,deps[k]\) for k in sorted\(deps\) if 'lucide' in k.lower\(\) or 'react-icons' in k.lower\(\) or 'lu' in k.lower\(\)]")
